Part.Source:
&XmlReader.OpenFromString(&CteArqXml) &ret = &XmlReader.ReadType(1,'infCte') If &ret <> 0 &SdtXmlCte.infCte.versao = &XmlReader.GetAttributeByName('versao') //versão EndIf &XmlReader.Close()
//PROTOCOLO Do 'protCTe'
//QRCode do 'QrCode'
&XmlReader.OpenFromString(&CteArqXml) &ret = &XmlReader.ReadType(1, 'infCte') if &ret <> 0 &SdtXmlCte.InfCte.Id = &XmlReader.GetAttributeByName('Id') //Id Cte &XmlReader.Read()
// LEITURA XML Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'infCTe' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'ide' &XmlReader.Read() //Avanca para o primeiro campo da tag... Do 'ide' Case &XmlReader.Name = 'compl' &XmlReader.Read() //Avanca para o primeiro campo da tag... Do 'compl' Case &XmlReader.Name = 'emit' &XmlReader.Read() //Avanca para o primeiro campo da tag... Do 'emit' Case &XmlReader.Name = 'toma' &XmlReader.Read() //Avanca para o primeiro campo da tag... Do 'toma' Case &XmlReader.Name = 'vPrest' &XmlReader.Read() //Avanca para o primeiro campo da tag... Do 'vPrest' Case &XmlReader.Name = 'infCTeNorm' &XmlReader.Read() //Avanca para o primeiro campo da tag...
Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'infCTeNorm' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'infServico' &XmlReader.Read() //Avanca para o primeiro campo da tag... Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'infServico' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xDescServ' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.infCTeNorm.infServico.xDescServ = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'infQ' &XmlReader.Read() Do 'infQ' EndCase
&XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif Enddo Case &XmlReader.Name = 'infModal' &XmlReader.Read() //Avanca para o primeiro campo da tag... Do 'infModal' EndCase
&XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif Enddo
Case &XmlReader.Name = 'imp' &XmlReader.Read() //Avanca para o primeiro campo da tag... Do 'imp'
Case &XmlReader.Name = 'infCteComp' &XmlReader.Read() Do 'Comp' EndCase
&XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif EndDo //infNFe EndIf
&XmlReader.close()
//PROTOCOLO Sub 'protCTe' &XmlReader.OpenFromString(&CteArqXml) &ret = &XmlReader.ReadType(1, 'protCTe') if &ret <> 0 &SdtXmlCte.protCTe.versao = &XmlReader.GetAttributeByName('versao') //versão &XmlReader.Read() Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'protCTe' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'infProt' &XmlReader.Read() Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'infProt' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'tpAmb' &SdtXmlCte.protCTe.infProt.tpAmb.FromString(&XmlReader.Value) Case &XmlReader.Name = 'verAplic' &SdtXmlCte.protCTe.infProt.verAplic = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'chCTe' &SdtXmlCte.protCTe.infProt.chCTe = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'dhRecbto' &SdtXmlCte.protCTe.infProt.dhRecbto = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'nProt' &SdtXmlCte.protCTe.infProt.nProt = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'digVal' &SdtXmlCte.protCTe.infProt.digVal = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'cStat' &SdtXmlCte.protCTe.infProt.cStat = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xMotivo' &SdtXmlCte.protCTe.infProt.xMotivo = &XmlReader.Value EndCase &XmlReader.Read()
if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif EndDo //</infProt> EndCase &XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif
EndDo //</protNFe> endif &XmlReader.Close() EndSub
//IDENTIFICACAO Sub 'ide' Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'ide' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'cUF' &SdtXmlCte.InfCte.ide.cUF.FromString(&XmlReader.Value) Case &XmlReader.Name = 'cCT' &SdtXmlCte.InfCte.ide.cCT = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'CFOP' &SdtXmlCte.InfCte.ide.CFOP = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'natOp' &SdtXmlCte.InfCte.ide.natOp = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'forPag' &SdtXmlCte.InfCte.ide.forPag = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'mod' &SdtXmlCte.InfCte.ide.mod.FromString(&XmlReader.Value) Case &XmlReader.Name = 'serie' &SdtXmlCte.InfCte.ide.serie = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'nCT' &SdtXmlCte.InfCte.ide.nCT = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'dhEmi' &SdtXmlCte.InfCte.ide.dhEmi = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'tpImp' &SdtXmlCte.InfCte.ide.tpImp = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'tpEmis' &SdtXmlCte.InfCte.ide.tpEmis = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'cDV' &SdtXmlCte.InfCte.ide.cDV = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'tpAmb' &SdtXmlCte.InfCte.ide.tpAmb = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'tpCTe' &SdtXmlCte.InfCte.ide.tpCTe = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'procEmi' &SdtXmlCte.InfCte.ide.procEmi = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'verProc' &SdtXmlCte.InfCte.ide.verProc = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'indGlobalizado' &SdtXmlCte.InfCte.ide.indGlobalizado = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'cMunEnv' &SdtXmlCte.InfCte.ide.cMunEnv = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xMunEnv' &SdtXmlCte.InfCte.ide.xMunEnv = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'UFEnv' &SdtXmlCte.InfCte.ide.UFEnv = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'modal' &SdtXmlCte.InfCte.ide.modal = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'tpServ' &SdtXmlCte.InfCte.ide.tpServ = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'cMunIni' &SdtXmlCte.InfCte.ide.cMunIni = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xMunIni' &SdtXmlCte.InfCte.ide.xMunIni = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'UFIni' &SdtXmlCte.InfCte.ide.UFIni = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'cMunFim' &SdtXmlCte.InfCte.ide.cMunFim = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xMunFim' &SdtXmlCte.InfCte.ide.xMunFim = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'UFFim' &SdtXmlCte.InfCte.ide.UFFim = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'retira' &SdtXmlCte.InfCte.ide.retira = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'indIEToma' &SdtXmlCte.InfCte.ide.indIEToma = &XmlReader.Value EndCase
&XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif
EndDo EndSub
Sub 'compl' Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'compl' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xCaracAd' &SdtXmlCte.InfCte.compl.xCaracAd = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xCaracSer' &SdtXmlCte.InfCte.compl.xCaracSer = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'origCalc' &SdtXmlCte.InfCte.compl.origCalc = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'destCalc' &SdtXmlCte.InfCte.compl.destCalc = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xObs' &SdtXmlCte.InfCte.compl.xobs = &XmlReader.Value EndCase
&XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif EndDo EndSub
//EMITENTE Sub 'emit' Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'emit' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'CNPJ' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.emit.CNPJ = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'IE' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.emit.IE = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xNome' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.emit.xNome = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xFant' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.emit.xFant = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'enderEmit' &XmlReader.Read() Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'enderEmit' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xLgr' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.emit.enderEmit.xLgr = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'nro' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.emit.enderEmit.nro = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xCpl' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.emit.enderEmit.xCpl = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xBairro' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.emit.enderEmit.xBairro = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'cMun' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.emit.enderEmit.cMun = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xMun' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.emit.enderEmit.xMun = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'UF' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.emit.enderEmit.UF.FromString(&XmlReader.Value) Case &XmlReader.Name = 'CEP' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.emit.enderEmit.CEP = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'fone' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.emit.enderEmit.fone = &XmlReader.Value EndCase &XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif
EndDo EndCase &XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif
EndDo EndSub
//TOMADOR Sub 'toma' Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'toma' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'CNPJ' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.toma.CNPJ = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'CPF' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.toma.CPF = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'IE' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.toma.IE = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xNome' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.toma.xNome = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'fone' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.toma.fone = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'enderToma' &XmlReader.Read() Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'enderToma' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xLgr' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.toma.enderToma.xLgr = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'nro' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.toma.enderToma.nro = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xCpl' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.toma.enderToma.xCpl = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xBairro' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.toma.enderToma.xBairro = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'cMun' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.toma.enderToma.cMun = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xMun' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.toma.enderToma.xMun = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'UF' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.toma.enderToma.UF.FromString(&XmlReader.Value) Case &XmlReader.Name = 'CEP' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.toma.enderToma.CEP = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'cPais' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.toma.enderToma.cPais = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xPais' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.toma.enderToma.xPais = &XmlReader.Value
EndCase &XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif EndDo Case &XmlReader.Name = 'email' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.toma.email = &XmlReader.Value EndCase &XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif
EndDo EndSub
//PRESTAÇÃO Sub 'vPrest' Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'vPrest' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'vTPrest' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.vPrest.vTPrest = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'vRec' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.VPrest.vRec = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'Comp' &XmlReader.Read() &SdtXmlCteComp = new() Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'Comp' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xNome' &SdtXmlCteComp.xNome = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'vComp' &SdtXmlCteComp.vComp = &XmlReader.Value EndCase
&XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif EndDo &SdtXmlCte.infCte.VPrest.Compp.Add(&SdtXmlCteComp) EndCase
&XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif EndDo EndSub
sub 'imp' Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'imp' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'ICMS' &XmlReader.Read() Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'ICMS' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'ICMSSN' &XmlReader.Read() Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'ICMSSN' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'CST' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.Imp.ICMS.ICMSSN.CST = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'indSN' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.Imp.ICMS.ICMSSN.indSN = &XmlReader.Value EndCase
&XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif
EndDo //</ICMSSN> Case &XmlReader.Name = 'ICMS45' &XmlReader.Read() Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'ICMS45' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'CST' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.Imp.ICMS.ICMS45.CST = &XmlReader.Value EndCase
&XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif
EndDo //</ICMS45> Case &XmlReader.Name = 'ICMS00' &XmlReader.Read() Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'ICMS00' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'CST' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.Imp.ICMS.ICMS00.CST = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'vBC' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.Imp.ICMS.ICMS00.vBC = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'pICMS' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.Imp.ICMS.ICMS00.pICMS = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'vICMS' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.Imp.ICMS.ICMS00.vICMS = &XmlReader.Value EndCase &XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif
EndDo //</ICMS00> Case &XmlReader.Name = 'ICMS20' &XmlReader.Read() Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'ICMS20' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'CST' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.Imp.ICMS.ICMS20.CST = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'pRedBC' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.Imp.ICMS.ICMS20.pRedBC = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'vBC' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.Imp.ICMS.ICMS20.vBC = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'pICMS' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.Imp.ICMS.ICMS20.pICMS = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'vICMS' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.Imp.ICMS.ICMS20.vICMS = &XmlReader.Value EndCase
&XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif
EndDo //</ICMS20> Case &XmlReader.Name = 'ICMS60' &XmlReader.Read() Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'ICMS60' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'CST' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.Imp.ICMS.ICMS60.CST = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'vBCSTRet' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.Imp.ICMS.ICMS60.vBCSTRet = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'vICMSSTRet' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.Imp.ICMS.ICMS60.vICMSSTRet = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'pICMSSTRet' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.Imp.ICMS.ICMS60.pICMSSTRet = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'vCred' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.Imp.ICMS.ICMS60.vCred = &XmlReader.Value EndCase
&XmlReader.Read() If &XmlReader.EOF Exit EndIf
EndDo //</ICMS60> Case &XmlReader.Name = 'ICMS90' &XmlReader.Read() Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'ICMS90' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'CST' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.Imp.ICMS.ICMS90.CST = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'pRedBC' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.Imp.ICMS.ICMS90.pRedBC = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'vBC' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.Imp.ICMS.ICMS90.vBC = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'pICMS' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.Imp.ICMS.ICMS90.pICMS = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'vICMS' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.Imp.ICMS.ICMS90.vICMS = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'vCred' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.Imp.ICMS.ICMS90.vCred = &XmlReader.Value EndCase
&XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif
EndDo //</ICMS90> EndCase &XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif EndDo //</ICMS>
Case &XmlReader.Name = 'infTribFed' &XmlReader.Read() Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'infTribFed' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'vPIS' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.Imp.infTribFed.vPIS = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'vCOFINS' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.Imp.infTribFed.vCOFINS = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'vIR' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.Imp.infTribFed.vIR = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'vINSS' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.Imp.infTribFed.vINSS = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'vCSLL' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.Imp.infTribFed.vCSLL = &XmlReader.Value
EndCase
&XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif EndDo EndCase
&XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif EndDo EndSub
SUB 'infQ' Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'infQ' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'qCarga' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.infCTeNorm.infServico.infQ.qCarga = &XmlReader.Value Endcase
&XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif EndDo EndSub
Sub 'infModal' Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'infModal' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'rodoOS' &XmlReader.Read() Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'rodoOS' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'TAF' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.infCTeNorm.infModal.rodoOS.TAF = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'NroRegEstadual' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.infCTeNorm.infModal.rodoOS.NroRegEstadual = &XmlReader.Value
Case &XmlReader.Name = 'veic' &XmlReader.Read()
Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'veic'
Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'placa' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.infCTeNorm.infModal.rodoOS.veic.placa = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'RENAVAM' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.infCTeNorm.infModal.rodoOS.veic.RENAVAM = &XmlReader.Value EndCase
&XmlReader.Read() If &XmlReader.EOF Exit Endif EndDo
Case &XmlReader.Name = 'infFretamento' &XmlReader.Read()
Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'infFretamento' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'tpFretamento' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.infCTeNorm.infModal.rodoOS.infFretamento.tpFretamento = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'dhViagem' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.infCTeNorm.infModal.rodoOS.infFretamento.dhViagem = &XmlReader.Value EndCase
&XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif EndDo EndCase
&XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif EndDo Endcase &XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif EndDo EndSub
Sub 'Comp' Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'infCteComp' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'chCTe' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.infCteComp.chCTe = &XmlReader.Value EndCase &XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif EndDo EndSub
sub 'QrCode' &auxCteArqXml = &CteArqXml.ToString() &Inicio = &auxCteArqXml.IndexOf('<![CDATA[', 1) &Fim = &auxCteArqXml.IndexOf(']]>', 2) if &Inicio <> 0 and &Fim <> 0 &Tamanho = &Fim - &Inicio //&Tamanho += 1 &VarChar = &auxCteArqXml.Substring(&Inicio, &Tamanho) &VarChar = &VarChar.Replace('<![CDATA[', '') &VarChar = &VarChar.Replace(']]>', '')
&VarChar = trim(&VarChar) &valqrCode = gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 1, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 2, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 3, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 4, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 5, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 6, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 7, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 8, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 9, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 10, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 11, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 12, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 13, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 14, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 15, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 16, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 17, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 18, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 19, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 20, 100)
&SdtXmlCte.protCTe.qrcode = &valqrCode
Else &Inicio = &auxCteArqXml.IndexOf('<qrCodCTe>', 1) &Fim = &auxCteArqXml.IndexOf('</qrCodCTe>', 2) if &Inicio <> 0 and &Fim <> 0
&Tamanho = &Fim - &Inicio //&Tamanho += 1 &VarChar = &auxCteArqXml.Substring(&Inicio, &Tamanho) &VarChar = &VarChar.Replace('<qrCodCTe>', '') &VarChar = &VarChar.Replace('</qrCodCTe>', '')
&VarChar = trim(&VarChar) &valqrCode = gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 1, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 2, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 3, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 4, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 5, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 6, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 7, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 8, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 9, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 10, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 11, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 12, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 13, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 14, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 15, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 16, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 17, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 18, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 19, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 20, 100)
&SdtXmlCte.protCTe.qrcode = &valqrCode
Endif EndIF EndSub
